MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-05-2022 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE DEC-05-2022 HEARING RE: PETITIONER RAMESES JOHNSON'S PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 ON THE SAME DATE (12/5/22) AT 9:30 A.M. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL CASES RELATED TO REAL PROPERTY PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PETITIONER RAMESES JOHNSON'S AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN HEARING SET FOR DEC-05-2022 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501

Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Dec-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER RAMESES JOHNSON's Petition For Release Of Property From Lien.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date (12/5/22) at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all cases related to real property per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

PETITIONER RAMESES JOHNSON'S AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN
Off Calendar Dec-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michael Rooney, 415.533.0282 of Michael Rooney Law Office, P.C. appearing for Petitioner Rameses Johnson.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER RAMESES JOHNSON'S AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare order. Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Continued To Dec-05-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
